allow: Bash(node -e "import\(''lucide-react''\).then\(m => console.log\(Object.keys\(m\).filter\(k => k.includes\(''Play''\) || k.includes\(''Video''\) || k.includes\(''Tv''\) || k.includes\(''Monitor''\)\).filter\(k => !k.includes\(''Lucide''\) && !k.includes\(''Icon''\)\).join\('', ''\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "import\(''express''\).then\(m => console.log\(''Express version:'', m.default ? ''default export'' : ''named'', Object.keys\(m\).join\('', ''\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import express from ''express''; const app = express\(\); import\(''./routes/auth.js''\).then\(m => { console.log\(''Auth module keys:'', Object.keys\(m\)\); console.log\(''Default export:'', typeof m.default\); console.log\(''Has stack:'', m.default?.stack ? m.default.stack.length + '' routes'' : ''no stack''\); }\)")
